overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime driving through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The journey transitions from an underground parking garage to bustling city streets adorned with holographic billboards, then enters a highway tunnel. The scene features wet reflective roads, cyberpunk architecture with glass towers, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage with concrete pillars

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dimly lit parking garage, following the ramp toward the exit

entered.detail: large structural concrete pillars supporting the parking garage ceiling
fluorescent tube lighting running along the garage ceiling
circular sign indicating parking level mounted on the wall
orange painted concrete wall section marking the exit path

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dimly lit underground parking garage characterized by massive concrete pillars and fluorescent ceiling lights. The vehicle follows yellow parking lines toward the exit ramp, with orange wall panels visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street transitioning from underground garage

events.description: exits underground parking garage into open urban street with neon lighting
ambient lighting shifts from fluorescent artificial to vibrant neon city lights

agents.ego_description: emerging from the garage onto city streets and merging with urban traffic flow

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows lining the street
bright neon advertisements and store signs glowing in the night
large floating digital advertisement displaying animated content
modern glass facade building with ground floor shops

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the parking garage into a vibrant cyberpunk cityscape. Neon signs and holographic billboards illuminate the street as futuristic buildings rise on both sides. The transition from the dim garage to the bright urban environment is marked by a dramatic shift in lighting.

events.description: approaching intersection with pedestrian crosswalk markings
slight right turn to follow road curvature through commercial area

agents.ego_description: cruising through the neon-lit commercial district, navigating intersections and observing the futuristic cityscape

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same direction through the intersection

entered.detail: tall glass and steel tower with illuminated windows reaching into the night sky
massive building-mounted display showing animated advertisements
concrete and metal barrier separating lanes on the right side
suspended traffic light with green signal illuminated

segments.scene_description: Driving through the heart of the commercial district surrounded by towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards. The vehicle navigates intersections marked with crosswalks while following a red sedan ahead. Neon lights reflect off the wet asphalt, creating a characteristic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with construction barriers and guardrails

events.description: following silver sedan through moderate traffic flow
road narrows with yellow guardrails and construction barriers on both sides

agents.ego_description: following a silver sedan through streets lined with construction barriers, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead and occasionally braking for traffic

entered.detail: orange and white striped barriers marking road construction zone
bright yellow metal guardrails lining the left side of the road
low-rise commercial building with illuminated shop windows
tall plain concrete wall with graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle follows a silver sedan through a section of road narrowed by construction barriers and yellow guardrails. Storefront buildings line the left side while a tall concrete wall runs along the right. The urban environment remains densely packed with neon signage and illuminated billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway tunnel entrance with artificial lighting

events.description: entering highway tunnel from open city street
transition from neon city lights to uniform artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: entering the highway tunnel, accelerating slightly as the environment becomes enclosed

notable_agents.action: silver sedan entering tunnel ahead, tail lights visible in the distance

entered.detail: large arched tunnel portal with overhead lighting fixtures
rows of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior
overhead gantry sign displaying route information and directions
smooth concrete walls lining both sides of the tunnel passage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and enters a highway tunnel, leaving the neon-lit city behind. The environment shifts to an enclosed concrete passage illuminated by uniform overhead lighting. The silver sedan ahead enters the tunnel first, its tail lights visible in the distance as the road continues into the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a dim underground facility into a vibrant neon metropolis before descending into a highway tunnel. It begins by navigating a dimly lit parking garage among massive concrete pillars and fluorescent lights, following yellow lines toward an exit ramp. As the vehicle emerges, the scene shifts dramatically from the gray concrete to a brilliant urban landscape filled with towering skyscrapers and glowing holographic billboards. The camera then pushes through the heart of the commercial district, where neon lights reflect off wet asphalt and the road narrows between construction barriers and storefronts. Finally, the environment closes in as the vehicle follows a silver sedan away from the city lights and into the uniform overhead illumination of a concrete highway tunnel.
